Variables.Name: OutputIndex
Variables.Description: Index into Expression's outputs array that this input is connected to.

Variables.Name: InputName
Variables.Description:
optional FName of the input.  
	  Note that this is the only member which is not derived from the output currently connected.

Variables.Name: ExpressionName
Variables.Description: Material expression name that this input is connected to, or None if not connected. Used only in cooked builds

Variables.Name: Expression
Variables.Description: UMaterial expression that this input is connected to, or NULL if not connected.
